display.title: Display
display.description: Density adjusts table row, panel, and font sizing across the app. The setting is saved to this browser.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.helpText: PNG, JPG, or WebP, max 5 MiB. Auto-cropped to a circle and resized to 400×400. Updates immediately.

errors.tooLarge: File too large. Pick something under 5 MiB.
errors.resizedTooLarge: Resized image is still too large. Try a simpler picture.

email.title: Change email
email.description: We'll send a confirmation link to your new address. Once you click it, the change takes effect and every session is ended for security — you'll be asked to log in again with the new email.

pending.message: Confirmation link sent to <1>{{email}}</1>. Click it within 1 hour. Your sessions will be ended after you confirm.
pending.hint: Didn't get the email? Check spam, then start over below.

twoFactor.activeText: TOTP is active. To remove, confirm your password.
twoFactor.introText: Add a second factor by scanning a QR code in your authenticator (Aegis, 1Password, etc.).
twoFactor.successEnabled: Two-factor authentication enabled. Save your backup codes!

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Faster, more secure sign-in without a password. Browser or hardware key.
passkeys.unsupported: Your browser does not support passkeys.
